scripts.translate: npm run translate:pot && npm run translate:update
scripts.translate:pot: wp i18n make-pot app ./resources/lang/octa.pot --domain=octa --ignore-domain && wp i18n make-pot resources ./resources/lang/octa.pot --domain=octa --ignore-domain --merge=./resources/lang/octa.pot && wp i18n make-pot config ./resources/lang/octa.pot --domain=octa --ignore-domain --merge=./resources/lang/octa.pot
scripts.translate:update: for file in ./resources/lang/*.po; do wp i18n update-po ./resources/lang/octa.pot $file; done
scripts.translate:compile: npm run translate:mo && npm run translate:js
